title: Privilege Criteria Configuration
description: The privilege criteria configuration applied to a source.

id.description: The Id of the privilege criteria configuration. This is read-only.

sourceId.description: The Id of the source that the criteria configuration is applied to. This is read-only.

config.description: The configuration settings for privilege criteria evaluation.

globalPrivilegeLevelEnabled.description: Indicates whether the global privilege level is enabled.

singlePrivilegeLevel.description: The privilege level applied when the classification mode is SINGLE_PRIVILEGE_LEVEL.

criteriaPrivilegeLevel.description: The criteria used to evaluate the privilege level when the classification mode is CRITERIA_PRIVILEGE_LEVEL.

connectorHighEnabled.description: Indicates whether the connector high privilege criteria are enabled.

connectorMediumEnabled.description: Indicates whether the connector medium privilege criteria are enabled.

connectorLowEnabled.description: Indicates whether the connector low privilege criteria are enabled.

customHighEnabled.description: Indicates whether the custom high privilege criteria are enabled.

customMediumEnabled.description: Indicates whether the custom medium privilege criteria are enabled.

customLowEnabled.description: Indicates whether the custom low privilege criteria are enabled.

created.description: The date and time when the privilege criteria configuration was created. This is read-only.

modified.description: The date and time when the privilege criteria configuration was last modified. This is read-only.
